description: Servicios (consulting, coaching, agencias): value-based pricing, retainer models

items.name: Value-Based Pricing (not hourly)
items.tactic: Price on outcome, not hours. If I save $100k, price $25k. Client happy, you happy.

items.name: Productized Services
items.tactic: Service en package (Website audit $2k, Setup $5k, Monthly management $1k). Scalable, repeatable.
